expectations.evidence: Uses `add_feature_value_record` (not `add_feature_value`) for multi-column features and explicitly states 'Uses `add_feature_value_record` because multiple columns are involved'
Entries show mixed optionality: IMG1 and IMG3 include confidence, while IMG2 and IMG4 omit it
Key Points states: 'Required columns (Diagnosis_Type) must be in every entry'
Key Points states: 'Optional columns (confidence) can be included or omitted per entry'
Step 1 reads 'deriva://feature/Image/Diagnosis' to confirm column requirements before adding values
